---
title: 'I need to Die... The secret to LIFE'
date: '2015-05-07T16:01:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1020319151155491763'
blogger_filename: '/2015/05/i-need-to-die-secret-to-life.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Spiritual Growth'
---

<span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"><br /></span><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"><br /></span><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"><br /></span><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">ï»¿</span><br /><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rothenburg-ob-der-tauber-2011-st-jakob-002-045f8ec48e3f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"><img alt="Wood Carving of Last Supper - Rothenburg ob der Tauber 2011 St Jakob 002.JPG Wikipedia" border="0" closure_lm_424302="null" height="212" jua="true" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rothenburg-ob-der-tauber-2011-st-jakob-002-05abd8c2ff98.jpg" title="Wood Carving of Last Supper - Rothenburg ob der Tauber 2011 St Jakob 002.JPG Wikipedia" width="320" /></span></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif; font-size: small;">Rothenburg ob der Tauber 2011 St Jakob 002 (</span><a href="/images/imported/en-wikipedia-org/rothenburg-ob-der-tauber-2011-st-jakob-002-13632cbc792c.jpg" target="_blank"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif; font-size: small;">Wiki</span></a><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif; font-size: small;">)</span></td></tr></tbody></table><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">ï»¿</span><br /><br /><br /><h4>The Wood Carver</h4><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Georgia','serif'; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt;"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">The smell of saw dust and morning dew fills his body with electricity. Arthur can feel his mind kick over, like the motor on his chain saw, coming alive. The scent of cut wood and well-worn tools in the shop cause his eyes to widen and heart to pump faster. Another day has come, another opportunity to get closer. <o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Georgia','serif'; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt;"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">It started with a large tree trunk, Red Wood, 9 feet tall and 6 feet in diameter. He used a chain saw at first, gauging chunks away at a time. But as the form took shape he put the power </span><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wood_carving"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">tools</span></a><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"> down and switched to his knife, chisels, and mallet.<o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Georgia','serif'; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt;"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">Arthur Holtz enjoyed his lifeâ€™s work with vigor and passion. Many of his old friends mocked him. â€œâ€¦ throwing away all that talent on one lifelong project, when he could be selling smaller, more manageable works for a fortune!â€ Arthur ignored them, cut ties, and kept working. Theyâ€™d never understand. This was his purpose for being. <o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Georgia','serif'; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt;"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">Arthur didnâ€™t notice at first, when the form had not yet taken shapeâ€¦ but as the details began to become apparent, he realized he had one problem. <o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Georgia','serif'; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt;"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">The overgrowth. <o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Georgia','serif'; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt;"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">Every morning, the work he had completed the day before was over grown with vines, weeds, moss, and thorns. He would have to spend the first part of the morning cleaning up the overgrowth, before continuing his venture toward the image buried in his mindsâ€™ eye. <o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Georgia','serif'; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt;"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">If he dared to leave it alone for a week at a time, he could hardly recognize the work he had completed, buried beneath the new growth. The tendency to delay for weeks or months at a time, then work in binges was counterproductive and hard. He would spend more time undoing the new overgrowth then getting the image brought forward. <o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Georgia','serif'; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt;"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">Therefore, he made a decision to keep working daily, instead of binging on his work. It was an easy and enjoyable task when done daily. The real image, the image that this tree was meant to bear, was buried beneath the outer shell and growth of the world around it. <o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Georgia','serif'; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt;"><o:p><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"></span></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Georgia','serif'; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt;"><o:p><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"></span></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Georgia','serif'; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt;"><o:p><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"></span></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Georgia','serif'; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt;"><o:p><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"></span></o:p></span></div><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"><br /></span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/galatians/2-20.html"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">Galatians 2:20 <span style="font-size: small;"><small class="text-muted">NIV</small> </span></span></a><br /><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"></span><li class="list-group-item"><div class="text-success hidden-xs"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">http://www.biblestudytools.com/galatians/2-20.html </span></div><div class="highlight-keywords"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"><strong>20</strong> I have been crucified with Christ and I no longer live, but Christ lives in me. The <span class="highlight">life</span> I live in the body, I live by faith in the Son of God, who loved me and gave himself for me. </span></div></li><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"></span></blockquote><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"><br /></span><br /><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">The secret to living a full LIFE, is to die.. to self. We were born with an old sin nature, thanks to the First Adam. The Second Adam caused us to be reborn. The Image of The One is inside of us. However, the only way to access that image is to die to self and allow His Image to come forth. </span><br /><br /><span style="font-family: Georgia;">We must daily die to self, and let the image of God come through a little more each day. </span><br /><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"><br /></span><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"><br /></span><span style="font-family: 'Georgia','serif'; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt;"><blockquote class="tr_bq"><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Georgia','serif'; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt;"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">Arthur, common nickname: Art<o:p></o:p></span></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Georgia','serif'; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt;"><a href="http://www.bje.org.au/learning/jewishself/family/familynames.html"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">HOLTZ</span></a><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"> (wood) (used for someone whose occupation involved wood),<o:p></o:p></span></span></div></blockquote><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0pt;"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"></span></div></span><br /><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">*</span><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">Tweet These:</span></b><br /><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">#</span><a href="http://ctt.ec/8E5X7" target="_blank"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">TellYourStory</span></a><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">#</span><a href="http://ctt.ec/5xc67" target="_blank"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">BeStillBeLed</span></a></blockquote><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"><br /></span><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">More about </span><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/2014/10/be-still-and-be-led-by-his-still-small.html" target="_blank"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">BeStillBeLed</span></a><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">&nbsp;&lt;</span><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/2014/10/be-still-and-be-led-by-his-still-small.html" target="_blank"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">here</span></a><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">&gt;</span><br /><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">And now I leave you with a question:</span><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">So... Are you carving daily?</span><a class="g-profile" href="https://plus.google.com/106337514196493406365" target="_blank"></a></b></blockquote><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"><br /></span><b><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">Hit me up on Twitter </span><a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" target="_blank"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">@DarrellWolfe </span></a><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">or on Google </span><a class="g-profile" href="https://plus.google.com/106337514196493406365" target="_blank"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">+DarrellWolfe</span></a></b><br /><h4><script src="https://apis.google.com/js/plusone.js"></script><g:plus action="share"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"></span></g:plus></h4><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">By&nbsp;</span><a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">Darrell Wolfe</span></a><br /><div><ul><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" target="_blank"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">New Here? Start HERE</span></a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/got-freedom.html" target="_blank"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">Got LIFE?</span></a></li><li><a href="http://eepurl.com/MzAVr" target="_blank"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">Insight In Your Inbox: Sign up for email delivery here</span></a><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">.&nbsp;</span></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/banking-basics-for-believers-book-by.html" target="_blank"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">Click Here To Get My Book: "Banking Basics for Believers"</span></a><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;">, which guides you through the basics of banking and money from a Christian Perspective.&nbsp;</span></li></ul></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><span style="font-family: Georgia, &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, serif;"><img border="0" height="232" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" width="320" /></span></a></div>
